heading: 4th year IT student. Full-time content operator.
paragraphs: I'm a Bachelor of Science in Information Technology student at National University Laguna × Asia Pacific College, expected to graduate July 2027. Alongside classes, I run ERO | VISUALS — a content brand I built from zero, managing every content calendar, digital asset, and deadline myself — and serve as Video Production Officer for my university's Student Council.

Most of my audience is local, but I've also delivered a commissioned edit for a U.S.-based recording artist that reached 3.9M views — proof I can read a global algorithm, not just a local one. I work in Premiere Pro and After Effects daily, and use AI tools like Claude to speed up planning and research without cutting corners on quality.
Open to part-time and full-time remote work — as a Virtual Assistant / Content Operations support, or on video editing and web projects — across US, UK, AU, and Asia time zones.

education.label: BS Information Technology (Mobile & Web Applications), NU Laguna × APC
